with open\('/Users/abbos/Desktop/Laravel/sies/app/Helpers/LocalizationHelper.php', 'rb'\) as f:

")

Bash(python3 -c "
path = '/Users/abbos/Desktop/Laravel/sies/app/Helpers/LocalizationHelper.php'
with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

fixed = content.replace\(b'\\xe2\\x80\\x98', b\\"'\\"\).replace\(b'\\xe2\\x80\\x99', b\\"'\\"\)

with open\(path, 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(fixed\)

count = content.count\(b'\\xe2\\x80\\x98'\) + content.count\(b'\\xe2\\x80\\x99'\)
print\(f'Replaced {count} curly quotes'\)
")
